Header.Name: cst-triBuilding - Synchronous - Onchange Lease Authority
Header.Description: When Lease Authority Indicator is selected update GUI fields for Federal. Updated for changes to value names in the classification

Task.TaskLabel: Update triGovUSFedLegalInterest from triBuilding Embedded Object

Condition.Expression: p0 == "Provider of Choice Authority - Delegation from GSA" || p1 == "PC"
p0 == "Categorical Space - Delegation from GSA" || p1 == "CS"

Task.FilterBo: triLeaseAuthority - Workflow - Get Lease Authority Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Update triGovUSFedLegalInterest from triBuilding Embedded Object

Task.FilterBo: triLeaseAuthority - Workflow - Get Lease Authority Classification
triLeaseAuthority - Workflow - Get Lease Authority Classification
triLeaseAuthority - Workflow - Get Lease Authority Classification
triLeaseAuthority - Workflow - Get Lease Authority Classification

Task.TaskLabel: Update triGovUSFedLegalInterest from triBuilding Embedded Object
Task.Description: Update triGovUSFedLegalInterest from triBuilding Embedded Object

Task.TaskLabel: Update triGovUSFedLegalInterest from triBuilding Embedded Object

Update triGovUSFedLegalInterest from triBuilding Embedded Object

Condition.Expression: p0 == "Special Purpose space - Delegation from GSA" || p1 == "SP"
